loop1.title: Thermal Timeline
loop1.note: This card requires engine thermal temperature columns (coolant, oil, intake, exhaust) which are not measured by this electrical meter.

loop1.title: Pressure · Speed · Load
loop1.note: Showing load percentage (derived from active power) — oil pressure and engine speed are not measured by this asset's meter.

loop2: 'diesel-generator-asset-dashboard/engine-cooling' answers the prompt as routed; these cards cover quantities not recorded for this asset and render honest-blank per-leaf with the reason: Thermal Timeline (This card requires engine thermal temperature columns (coolant, oil, intake, exhaust) which are not measured by this electrical meter.).
